name: Oven Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Lean stew beef in 1-inch cubes
1 can Cream of Celery soup (10 oz)
1/2 package Dry leek soup mix (2.4 oz)
5 medium Baking potatoes, peeled and cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, combine beef, undiluted soup, dry soup mix, wine, and onion. Mix well. Top with potato pieces and carrots, mixing in slightly. Cover and bake for 2 hours.
2. Stir in broccoli, cover, and bake for an additional 15 minutes. Remove the cover and bake for another 15 minutes longer.
